description_long: This is a modern apartment building with a rectangular footprint, featuring three main floors and a rooftop area. The facade is predominantly white with subtle beige accents around the windows and corners, and the front entrance is accessible via a central pathway flanked by green strips and parked cars. The building has a symmetrical arrangement of windows and balconies, with a central stairwell visible through open railings. The rooftop includes a small structure, likely for utilities or access, and is partially furnished. The sides and rear of the building are simpler, with fewer windows and some landscaping along the perimeter. The overall design is functional and contemporary, suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, three-story apartment building with a white facade, central entrance, and rooftop access, surrounded by green landscaping and parking. Symmetrical windows and balconies define its contemporary urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central stairwell, symmetrical windows, balconies, green strips, and parked cars.
description_view_1: Side view with minimal windows, green landscaping, and a clear view of the rooftop area and its access structure.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain facade, fewer windows, and some landscaping at the base, highlighting the building's rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing minimal windows, green landscaping, and rooftop details.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns on the front and rear facades, with even spacing and alignment across all floors. Side facades have fewer, evenly spaced windows.
